title: Cirrus: Make use of shared get_ci_vm container
body:
***Note***: An updated version of common automation tooling required, also included in new VM images.

Depends on:
    https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/57
    https://github.com/containers/automation/pull/64
    https://github.com/containers/automation/pull/66
    https://github.com/containers/automation/pull/67
    https://github.com/containers/automation/pull/68

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body: need to ensure we have `libcap2 100:2.48-1` and `crun 100:0.18-3`

```
root@cevich-ubuntu-c4882372358307840:/# dpkg -l libcap2 crun
Desired=Unknown/Install/Remove/Purge/Hold
| Status=Not/Inst/Conf-files/Unpacked/halF-conf/Half-inst/trig-aWait/Trig-pend
|/ Err?=(none)/Reinst-required (Status,Err: uppercase=bad)
||/ Name           Version      Architecture Description
+++-==============-============-============-====================================
ii  crun           100:0.18-3   amd64        OCI runtime written in C
ii  libcap2:amd64  100:2.48-1   amd64        POSIX 1003.1e capabilities (library)
```

***Note:*** [The `int podman fedora-33 root container` test failure](https://storage.googleapis.com/cirrus-ci-6707778565701632-fcae48/artifacts/containers/podman/4933093237719040/html/int-podman-fedora-33-root-container.log.html) is being tracked [by a crun issue.](https://github.com/containers/crun/issues/639)
rebased and force-pushed w/ a minor safety-related change to the get_ci_vm interface.
rebased and added minor update to support debugging.
Pushed with new images with updated crun (needed to pass tests).
@containers/podman-maintainers PTAL, this is ready now (please try it out, if you're able)

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
